svg.title: Draft War Room v3 Architecture
svg.desc: A paper-style SVG architecture diagram for the NBA Draft War Room system, showing serverless collection, five-layer knowledge base, Bedrock multi-agent war room, tri-signal fusion, Monte Carlo simulation, and delivery outputs.
svg.text: Draft War Room: Tri-Signal Fusion with Native Multi-Agent War Room
2026 NBA Draft Prediction Agent System · AWS Serverless Architecture · v3.0

g.text: 数字进 DynamoDB；scouting / news 进 Bedrock KB；S3 保留原始可审计证据
planning / routing / synthesis / trace / audit log
Inline Agents: one GM template, 30 DNAs
LLM only produces decision functions once; Monte Carlo below performs cheap deterministic sampling at scale.
Draft War Room Core: signal encoding, agent preference, parallel simulation
if divergent: LLM reasoning + audit note
Pref = Talent + Need + Persona + Mock + Odds + Intel
Monte Carlo Simulation Backbone · Step Functions Distributed Map
each simulation yields a full board; frequencies become calibrated confidence
Stage I: data collection / knowledge grounding
Confidence = marginal frequency of final assigned pick

All components are sourced from the v3 implementation document: Fargate, S3, DynamoDB, Bedrock KB, Bedrock multi-agent, Inline GM Agents, Step Functions, Lambda/API Gateway, security and observability controls.
